first_run.rationale: The score is identical (4/10) across both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same, focusing consistently on the candidate's lack of recent C++ experience versus the job requirements. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal model variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment. Neither evaluation mentions the university, indicating the change from a Romanian to an Indian institution had no impact on the outcome.
